files.title: Frontend Polish Series
files.description: A curated reading path for improving interface quality, markdown rendering, and frontend implementation decisions.

posts.title: Markdown UI Stress Test for Long-Form Reading
posts.excerpt: A deliberately long non-technical post that exercises headings, lists, tables, code, callouts, embeds, math, diagrams, images, and other markdown features to visually QA the site.

posts.title: Getting Started with Modern Web Development
posts.excerpt: A comprehensive guide to starting your journey in web development with modern tools and best practices.

posts.title: Understanding Asynchronous JavaScript
posts.excerpt: Deep dive into async/await, promises, and how JavaScript handles asynchronous operations.

files.content: Use this playlist as a guided sequence for frontend-focused posts. It starts with visual QA and markdown rendering, then moves into broader web development and JavaScript implementation notes.
files.html: Use this playlist as a guided sequence for frontend-focused posts. It starts with visual QA and markdown rendering, then moves into broader web development and JavaScript implementation notes.
